name: Buy Porta Cabins
description:
Buy Porta Cabin — Factory Price, Pan India Delivery

When you buy porta cabin from SAMAN, you are purchasing directly from the manufacturer — not from a dealer, a broker, or an aggregator with a margin added between the factory and your site.

Premium container house with glass elevation installed near beachfront

Factory-Direct vs Dealer — Why the Source Matters When You Buy

Most porta cabins sold in India pass through at least one intermediary between the factory and the buyer. A dealer buys at factory price, adds a margin, and resells. That margin — typically 12 to 18% on a standard porta cabin — comes out of your budget without adding any value to the product.

SAMAN fabricates every porta cabin at our own facilities in Bangalore and Greater Noida. When you buy directly from us, your price is the factory price. The same steel grade, the same surface treatment, the same factory inspection — without a dealer layer.

Factory-built container office cabin installed at remote project site

Factory-direct also means one accountable party for quality, delivery, and warranty. If there is a fabrication issue, you call the manufacturer — not a dealer who then calls the manufacturer on your behalf.

How to Place Your Order — From First Call to Delivery

Buying a porta cabin from SAMAN follows a five-step sequence. Each step has a specific timeline.

Step 1 — Quote confirmation (same day): Call or WhatsApp +91 97089 89937 with your size, quantity, insulation requirement, and site location. We confirm a factory price within 24 hours.

Step 2 — Order confirmation (1–2 days): You confirm the specification, approve the quote, and pay the advance amount. We issue a purchase order acknowledgement with your confirmed specification, delivery timeline, and payment schedule.

Step 3 — Fabrication (7–18 working days): Your order goes into production at our Bangalore or Greater Noida facility. For standard sizes in stock configurations, fabrication is 7 to 12 working days. For custom dimensions, 14 to 18 working days.

Step 4 — Pre-dispatch inspection (1 day): Every unit undergoes a quality check before loading — frame dimensions, surface treatment coverage, door and window operation, electrical fit-out if included. An inspection report is raised.

Standard size portable cabin suitable for site office and security use

Step 5 — Delivery and handover (2–5 days transit): Your cabin is dispatched with a packing note and tracking confirmation. Delivery to sites across India within 7 to 21 working days total from order confirmation.

What You Receive — Purchase Package at Delivery

Every SAMAN porta cabin purchase includes the following at handover — not on request, not at additional cost:

A purchase invoice with full product specification. Pre-dispatch quality inspection report confirming frame dimensions, surface treatment, and functional checks. Product warranty certificate — 12 months on structural fabrication from delivery date, 6 months on electrical fit-out. Dimensional specification document confirming external and internal dimensions. Care and maintenance guide confirming the recommended painting schedule to achieve the full 20 to 25 year structural lifespan.

Prefab cabin delivered and installed in extreme remote terrain

For buyers who want full material certification including IS 2062 mill test certificates and surface treatment specification documentation, our ms porta cabin page details what is available on request.

Buy vs Rent — The Numbers That Make the Decision

A standard 10×10 ft SAMAN MS porta cabin purchased outright: Rs 1,05,000 to Rs 1,20,000 depending on insulation and fit-out. Amortised over a 36-month project life, the per-day cost is Rs 97 to Rs 111.

The same unit on monthly rental: Rs 4,500 to Rs 6,000 per month. Per-day cost: Rs 150 to Rs 200.

At a 36-month deployment, purchase saves Rs 1,90,000 to Rs 2,80,000 compared to rental. The break-even point between purchase and rental is approximately 18 to 22 months of continuous deployment. Below that, rental is more economical. Above it, purchase is significantly more economical.

Sizes Available for Purchase

Standard sizes available from SAMAN stock configurations: 10×10 ft — security and supervision. 10×20 ft — site office and storage. 12×20 ft — two-room with internal partition. 20×20 ft — open plan or partitioned. Custom dimensions from 8×8 ft to 20×40 ft on fabrication-to-order basis.

Customized container structure showing flexible design and premium finish

Stock configurations dispatch in 7 to 12 working days. Custom dimensions dispatch in 14 to 21 working days.

If you need a retail shop configuration with glass frontage and branded cladding, see our porta cabin shop page for purchase options in retail formats.

For the full SAMAN porta cabin range — all material options, rental availability, and delivery details — see our porta cabins hub page.

Frequently Asked Questions

Can I purchase a single porta cabin or is there a minimum order quantity?

Yes — SAMAN sells from a minimum of 1 unit. Single-unit orders are processed and dispatched on the same timeline as multi-unit orders. For orders of 5 or more units in the same configuration, a project-specific price is confirmed at the quote stage.

What is the payment schedule for a porta cabin purchase?

Standard payment terms are 60% advance at order confirmation and 40% before dispatch. For established contractors with a purchase history, we confirm revised payment terms at the quote stage. All payments are made directly to SAMAN Portable — we issue a GST-compliant invoice at each payment stage.

Does the purchase price include delivery and installation at my site?

Delivery cost depends on site distance from our Bangalore or Greater Noida facilities and is confirmed separately at the quote stage. Installation — off-loading, positioning, levelling, and connection — is included for sites within standard access conditions. All charges are itemized on the purchase invoice — no hidden costs.

Ready to place your order?

Tell us your size, quantity, insulation requirement, and site location. We will confirm specification, factory price, and delivery timeline within 24 hours.

Call or WhatsApp: +91 97089 89937
